title: dolichos axillaris var. pubescens
intro: Dolichos axillaris var. pubescens, also known as the hairy Dolichos, is a plant species within the legume family that is commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dolichos axillaris var. pubescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical application or incorporated into creams and ointments for its therapeutic benefits.
